definitions.usage_example: He went out despite the rain.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He went out despite the rain.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para mostrar un contraste o resultado inesperado (sinónimo de 'in spite of').]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to show a contrast or unexpected outcome (synonym of 'in spite of').

definitions.usage_example: He went out in spite of the rain.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE in spite of AL FR]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He went out in spite of the rain.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para mostrar un contraste o resultado inesperado (sinónimo de 'despite').]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to show a contrast or unexpected outcome (synonym of 'despite').

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Sin importar / Independientemente de]
definitions.usage_example: He bought the car regardless of the cost.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE regardless of AL FR]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He bought the car regardless of the cost.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para significar 'sin prestar atención a' o 'a pesar de'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to mean 'without paying attention to' or 'despite'.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: A diferencia de / En lugar de]
definitions.usage_example: I prefer tea, as opposed to coffee.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE as opposed to AL FR]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I prefer tea, as opposed to coffee.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para hacer un contraste directo entre dos cosas.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to make a direct contrast between two things.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: En cuanto a / Con respecto a]
definitions.usage_example: As for the money, we will pay you tomorrow.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE as for AL FR]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: As for the money, we will pay you tomorrow.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para introducir un nuevo tema o cambiar de tema.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to introduce a new topic or change the subject.
